title: Is Unstructured Data The Key To Successful AI Deployments?
summary: Hyland leadership and Erie Insurance's CIO discuss how unstructured data is fundamental to enabling agentic AI systems in enterprise contexts. The segment emphasizes that providing agents with relevant context from unstructured data sources drives real business impact and addresses failures in pilot programs and token allocation strategies.
writeup: This segment features Hyland leadership and Erie Insurance's CIO on why unstructured data is central to deploying agentic AI in enterprises. The argument: supplying agents with relevant context drawn from unstructured sources is what produces real business impact. The discussion also connects this to common failure points, addressing why pilot programs stall and how token allocation strategies factor into results.
